attacking_style: Insufficient data across multiple races to establish clear attacking pattern. Single race shows willingness to engage in KOM sprint battles on categorized climbs.
team_tactics: No observable team setup patterns from single race data. Individual efforts in breakaway contexts.
terrain_preference: Categorized climbs where raw power and climbing speed are advantageous. Appears capable on sustained gradients requiring sustained threshold output.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify specific weaknesses. Limited observations prevent tactical vulnerability assessment.
key_patterns: Relies on superior power output over tactical positioning in KOM contests.
form_trajectory: unknown: Single race snapshot from 2020 insufficient to determine trajectory without recent comparative data
